blockReason: tests/ directory is empty - no cargo test exists to validate documentation assertions

manualVerification.summary: Manual inspection confirms all M1 documentation is complete and correct, but automated test infrastructure is missing

findings.VAL-DOC-001: README.md has Installation section with rustup, cargo build --workspace, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
findings.VAL-DOC-002: README.md has Quickstart section with swell-daemon, swell task, swell watch
findings.VAL-DOC-003: README.md has End-to-End Workflow with 3+ CLI commands (task, watch, approve)
findings.VAL-DOC-004: README.md Crate Overview table lists all 12 crates
findings.VAL-DOC-005: README.md Troubleshooting section has 3 issues (connection refused, clippy, test timeout)
findings.VAL-DOC-006: AGENTS.md has Mermaid diagram with dependency relationships
findings.VAL-DOC-007: AGENTS.md Error Handling section covers thiserror and anyhow
findings.VAL-DOC-008: AGENTS.md lists all 12 crates including swell-skills
findings.VAL-DOC-010: Per-crate AGENTS.md files have Purpose, Public API, Architecture, Testing, Dependencies
findings.VAL-DOC-011: CONTRIBUTING.md has PR workflow, commit conventions, review process
findings.VAL-DOC-012: AGENTS.md Async Patterns section covers tokio, spawn, select, cancellation

blockers.description: tests/ directory is empty - no documentation validation tests exist
blockers.rootCause: The validation contract specifies tests should exist in tests/ directory but they were not created
blockers.impact: Cannot run automated validation via cargo test
